title: Stegostyla cracens
taxonomy: Stegostyla cracens is classified within the family Asclepiadaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as milkweeds. The genus Stegostyla is a small group of plants that are native to South Africa. Stegostyla cracens is a species of flowering plant that is endemic to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is a climbing plant with small, white flowers that are pollinated by insects. The classification of Stegostyla cracens is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Magnoliopsida.
intro: There is no information available on a plant species called Stegostyla cracens.
